message.content:
Search the codebase thoroughly for all Andes RISC-V CPU definitions. I need:

1. All CPU type names/models defined for Andes (look in target/riscv/ for cpu types, machine names, etc.)
2. Any Andes-specific machine definitions (look in hw/riscv/ for andes machine files)
3. How CPUs are registered (cpu_type strings, aliases)
4. Any documentation or help text about running Andes machines

Search for patterns like "andes", "ANDES", "Andes" in target/riscv/, hw/riscv/, and include/ directories. Also check for machine registration in hw/riscv/. Look for CPU model names like "a25", "a45", "ax25", "ax45", "ax65", "d25", "n25", etc.
